_comment: Offline bundle of known-bad OpenClaw/Hermes skills. Entries below are drawn from PUBLIC reporting of the ClawHavoc campaign (Koi Security, Jan–Feb 2026), Snyk's 'clawdhub' analysis, and Trend Micro / Antiy coverage of Atomic macOS Stealer (AMOS) delivery. agentscan ships with this offline copy and can refresh from a remote feed via `agentscan --update-feed`. Matching is by skill name/alias (case-insensitive); families use a representative name plus reported variants as aliases.
source: agentscan community feed (offline bundle) — ClawHavoc IoCs
references: Koi Security — ClawHavoc (2,857 skills audited; 341 malicious, 335 one campaign)
Snyk — 'clawdhub' malicious campaign (reverse shells via skills)
Trend Micro / Antiy — Trojan/OpenClaw.PolySkill, Atomic macOS Stealer (AMOS)

entries.name: clawhub
entries.note: ClawHub CLI typosquats (29+ variants reported). ClickFix social engineering that installs Atomic macOS Stealer (AMOS). Removed 2026-02-03; reappeared as renamed variants.

entries.name: auto-updater-agent
entries.note: Fake updater family; staged download pulling extra malware + reverse shell.

entries.name: weather-assistant
entries.note: Fake weather skill that steals ~/.clawdbot/.env (OpenClaw API keys) and exfiltrates to an external webhook.

entries.name: polymarket-trader
entries.note: Polymarket trading-bot lure (34+ skills). Harvests wallets, browser data, and .env via AMOS.

entries.name: solana-wallet
entries.note: Cryptocurrency lure (111+ crypto skills in campaign). Targets wallet keys; AMOS payload on macOS.

entries.name: youtube-summarize
entries.note: YouTube-utility lure (57+ skills). README/SKILL.md ClickFix prompt drops AMOS.

heuristics._comment: Calibrated to flag the EXFILTRATION SIGNATURE, not isolated patterns. A skill/plugin is flagged SUSPICIOUS only when it (a) reads a secret AND sends/executes something, or (b) shows an obfuscated-exec / ClickFix combo. A skill merely using process.env is NOT flagged. This trades a few missed-but-subtle cases for far fewer false positives — crying wolf destroys trust faster than a missed detection.
